posts.author: blvntbr
posts.title: "THEM".. TODAY'S NORMAL.

posts.raw_content:
Not going to give any incriminating evidence.  I used to work with this guy in my IT job.  He was in his mid 20's when he was interviewed for a job at SpaceX.  He got the job and moved to Hawthorne.  His wife eventually joined him later.  I remember he bought a Tesla when he started because employees got Yuge discounts.  He took a selfie with Elon when he got the car.  Elon recruited him to work on Twitter after he bought it.  

I just happened to get a notification from Linkedin and saw he made a post this evening saying he couldn't believe its been almost 10 years since he started working at SpaceX.  He listed X, xAI, Starlink and DOGE as things he'd been involved in.  I googled his name and DOGE and sure enough there's several articles about it, most not so pretty because of the DOGE stigma.  

He was just a few years younger than my daughters when he was going through the SpaceX interviews and I talked to him about it extensively because he was unsure of himself.  Told him it would be an amazing opportunity and that I was proud of him.

posts.content:
Not going to give any incriminating evidence. I used to work with this guy in my IT job. He was in his mid 20's when he was interviewed for a job at SpaceX. He got the job and moved to Hawthorne. His wife eventually joined him later. I remember he bought a Tesla when he started because employees got Yuge discounts. He took a selfie with Elon when he got the car. Elon recruited him to work on Twitter after he bought it.

I just happened to get a notification from Linkedin and saw he made a post this evening saying he couldn't believe its been almost 10 years since he started working at SpaceX. He listed X, xAI, Starlink and DOGE as things he'd been involved in. I googled his name and DOGE and sure enough there's several articles about it, most not so pretty because of the DOGE stigma.

He was just a few years younger than my daughters when he was going through the SpaceX interviews and I talked to him about it extensively because he was unsure of himself. Told him it would be an amazing opportunity and that I was proud of him.
